prompt: I have a live Hermes Kanban task t_ab12 on board product. Its body uses Objective, Scope, Acceptance, and Links sections; workspace/status/assignee are normal task fields. I need to run the external Ginflow harness before resuming work. Should I create a separate normalized card JSON? Give the exact integration path and explain where Ginflow reads each required field.
assertions: Rejects creating a separate shadow or normalized card JSON
Provides an external harness command with --kanban-task-id t_ab12 and --board product
Reads objective, scope, acceptance, and links from the live task body
Reads ID, workspace, status, and assignee from the Kanban task row
Reads artifact_baseline from latest completion-run metadata when present
